principles: Frozen contracts and explicit runtime semantics
Scenario evidence must gate release decisions
Metrics must be measured against thresholds
Governance actions must map to executable commands

milestones.title: Interface and metric freeze
milestones.description: Align chapter 6 contract freeze with chapter 7 metric definitions and lock architecture baseline.

milestones.title: A-F end-to-end closure
milestones.description: Run A-F scenarios through full chain and produce replayable evidence artifacts.

milestones.title: Key metric threshold pass
milestones.description: Ensure recall, explainability, latency and safety gates are measurable and enforced.

milestones.title: Pilot governance validation
milestones.description: Lock risk-trigger, stop-loss and release governance before pilot expansion.

milestones.title: Scaled validation and transfer
milestones.description: Expand sample size, verify portability, and produce reusable next-iteration baseline.

todos.title: Freeze architecture boundaries and dependency direction
todos.goal: Make module boundaries executable and reviewable.
acceptance: Architecture boundary document is updated
Workflow gate validates baseline files

todos.title: Standardize module contract template
todos.goal: Apply input-process-output-error-done contract format consistently.
acceptance: Core modules expose contract fields
Contract references are linked in docs

todos.title: Freeze shared types and error-code catalog
todos.goal: Keep request/response and ERR_* semantics stable across layers.
acceptance: Shared types compile and are imported by backend/frontend
No raw string throws at boundaries

todos.title: Freeze runtime semantics
todos.goal: Lock idempotency, timeout, retry, consistency and degrade behavior.
acceptance: requestId idempotency behavior is documented and tested
Timeout and retry defaults are explicit

todos.title: Build A-F scenario source-of-truth
todos.goal: Create replayable scenario fixtures aligned with plan definitions.
acceptance: A-F fixtures exist with deterministic expected outputs
Scenario IDs map to T-001 to T-006

todos.title: Enable plan-constrained todo automation
todos.goal: Provide script + manifest + docs + npm command entry points.
acceptance: todos script supports doctor/init/status/next/milestone
Manifest and operation docs are linked

todos.title: Run minimal backend core chain
todos.goal: Guarantee orchestrate_triage input-to-output path is runnable.
acceptance: Core backend request returns stable triage payload
No hidden global state in orchestration path

todos.title: Implement red-flag short-circuit and conservative escalation
todos.goal: Hard-stop unsafe outputs when emergency boundary is hit.
acceptance: Emergency conditions bypass debate loop
Offline escalation path is returned

todos.title: Implement DI-based conflict routing
todos.goal: Map dissent bands to deterministic handling branches.
acceptance: DI thresholds route to light/deep/escalate branches
Max debate rounds are bounded

todos.title: Complete audit-event and decision-trace pipeline
todos.goal: Guarantee full-chain traceability for every critical decision.
acceptance: Decision phases emit structured audit records
Reviewers can map output to decision trace

todos.title: Automate T-001 to T-006 scenario tests
todos.goal: Turn A-F scenario validation into repeatable CI checks.
acceptance: Scenario tests are executable by one command
Failure output points to scenario ID and cause

todos.title: Finish frontend minimal closed loop
todos.goal: Support symptom input, backend call and core result rendering.
acceptance: User can submit symptoms and view conclusion/status
Error and low-confidence states are visible

todos.title: Publish M2 evidence bundle
todos.goal: Produce replay logs and acceptance proof for M2 closure.
acceptance: A-F replay evidence is documented
Reviewer decision is PASS/BLOCK with findings

todos.title: Implement metrics computation pipeline
todos.goal: Compute recall, explainability, latency and governance indicators.
acceptance: Metrics report includes target and measured values
Computation is reproducible

todos.title: Enforce threshold gates for key indicators
todos.goal: Block release when metrics are below threshold.
acceptance: Gate checks fail on threshold violations
Failure output includes breached indicator

todos.title: Bind reviewer decision to gate outcomes
todos.goal: Reviewer must block when tests/ADR/metrics are unmet.
acceptance: Reviewer template includes explicit PASS/BLOCK
Gate failure IDs are included in findings

todos.title: Automate T-007 to T-010 enhanced governance tests
todos.goal: Validate baseline guard, evidence use, abstain and rollback behavior.
acceptance: T-007~T-010 are runnable
Governance chain has auditable output

todos.title: Prepare pilot runbook and role matrix
todos.goal: Lock pilot responsibilities, inputs and expected outputs.
acceptance: Runbook includes owner/collaborator/input/output
Pilot acceptance evidence checklist is defined

todos.title: Implement risk-trigger matrix automation
todos.goal: Translate risk triggers into executable controls.
acceptance: Risk trigger to action mapping is machine-checkable
ERR path mapping is documented

todos.title: Implement stop-loss and rollback guard
todos.goal: Freeze expansion and rollback when repeated key failures occur.
acceptance: Stop-loss trigger is explicit and testable
Rollback and re-test path is documented

todos.title: Build governance release package
todos.goal: Require ADR/audit/gate evidence before pilot release.
acceptance: Release checklist contains gates + ADR + audit links
Reviewer block logic references missing evidence

todos.title: Expand replay sample set to >=120
todos.goal: Support scaled validation with reproducible sampling evidence.
acceptance: Replay sample count reaches or exceeds 120
Batch report includes pass/fail breakdown

todos.title: Produce FHIR/SMART mapping validation
todos.goal: Keep interoperability mapping auditable without changing core boundaries.
acceptance: Mapping document covers required core objects
Validation record is attached

todos.title: Build scenario replication pipeline
todos.goal: Make scenario migration and replay reproducible for next sites.
acceptance: Replication command and docs exist
At least one replicated set passes baseline checks

todos.title: Track target-vs-actual metric ledger
todos.goal: Maintain target, measured value, deviation and corrective action records.
acceptance: Ledger includes target/actual/deviation/action fields
Each milestone has at least one completed record

todos.title: Finalize closeout and seed next iteration
todos.goal: Close current cycle with auditable evidence and bootstrap next cycle backlog.
acceptance: Milestone closeout report is published
Next-cycle backlog is created from unresolved risks
